name: Dill and watercress salsa with capers
intro: This fresh and herbed salsa makes a perfect partner for salads containing fish or meat. Try tossing it into the Tuna, artichoke, and pasta salad to give the dish a citrus tang.

ingredients.item: juice and finely grated zest of ½ lemon
sea salt and freshly ground black pepper

method: Put the dill and watercress in a bowl. Gently squeeze the halved cherry tomatoes to discard some of the seeds, then slice into quarters, and add to the bowl.
Chop the capers and stir into the tomato mixture, along with the lemon juice and zest. Stir, season with salt and pepper, and drizzle with olive oil.
Chill the salsa for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to blend. Stir again before serving.
